arts.ttl: “They stole our left back” – Bournemouth star extra motivated ahead of Liverpool tonight
arts.sum: Bournemouth forward Justin Kluivert has admitted he’s extra motivated to beat Liverpool this evening, after they stole left back Milos Kerkez from them. Viaplay in the Netherlands have a quick interview with the Bournemouth forward today ahead of the Premier League opener against Liverpool this evening.
